name: MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR4-5333+(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-A - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - 2x HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.3 (PROB760MAWID4)
shortName: MSI PRO B760M-A WIFI DDR4 Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Professional-grade Micro ATX motherboard with LGA 1700, dual video outputs, and DDR4 support.
